title: Test Hydroponic pH
description: Check acidity so your plants stay healthy.

dialogue.text: A stable pH keeps nutrients available to your plants. We'll test the reservoir and adjust if necessary.
Dip a pH strip into the solution. If the color is off, add small amounts of acid or base until you hit the target range around 6.5.
Great! Monitoring pH will keep your crops thriving and yields high.

options.text: I'll keep an eye on it.
